summary: EXP-091 adds an evidence hierarchy roadmap paragraph between the scorecard and section 1.1 in Part 1. It explains three tiers: (1) self-contradictions using dome-only parameters (hardest to escape), (2) point-by-point WIN evaluation, (3) kill-shot/falsification tests using external data. Acknowledges the dome's own Steelman Evidence Ladder as kernel of truth. NOTE: ISS-774 also has EXP-116 (pending) which adds connective narrative within parts 3-5 — that is the companion piece. Consider integrating both before closing ISS-774.
